name: Tines
description: Monitor Tines security automation workflows for incident response and security operations compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Tines
2. Go to Settings → API Tokens
3. Generate a new API token
4. Enter your tenant URL and token below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Tines → Settings → API Tokens

credentialFields.label: Tenant URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Tines tenant URL (e.g. https://mycompany.tines.com or https://app.tines.com)

checks.name: Incident Response
checks.description: Verifies Tines security automation stories are configured for incident response

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Tines team members with access to security automation workflows
